children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Notwithstanding sections 1712 and 1713 of title 43 and subject to valid existing rights, not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall convey to the highest qualified bidder all right, title, and interest of the United States in and to the Federal parcel.November 6, 2002
5 percent shall be available to the State for use in the general education program of the State; and

children.label: A
children.text: the construction and operation of facilities to support the management of the Conservation Area;

children.label: B
children.text: the construction and repair of trails and roads in the Conservation Area authorized under the management plan;

children.label: C
children.text: research on and interpretation of the archaeological and geological resources of the Conservation Area;

children.label: D
children.text: conservation and research relating to the Conservation Area; and

children.label: E
children.text: any other purpose that the Secretary determines to be consistent with the purpose described in .section 460qqq of this title
